flagship.name: PromptOps
flagship.tagline: Git-native prompt management and testing for production LLM workflows
flagship.why: We solved release engineering for code twenty years ago. We forgot to solve it for AI.

thoughts: We solved release engineering for code twenty years ago. We forgot to solve it for AI.
The best architecture is the one you don't notice.
Stop picking frameworks, start classifying workflows.
Your prompts deserve the same respect as your code.
Complexity is the enemy of reliability.
The best time to refactor was yesterday. The second best time is now.
fun_facts: I debug with coffee and curiosity
I've been on GitHub since 2013 — seen frameworks rise and fall
I built a JSON editor in pure Python that works offline
I automate everything — including this profile
I write on Medium about the things that break in production
